news.t: Firms launch options on swap-based Bitcoin ETF
Options Market Now Open for Latest T-REX 2X/-2X Bitcoin Daily Target ETFs
REX Shares and Tuttle Capital Management Launch 2X Leveraged and Inverse Spot Bitcoin ETPs

overview.description: The T-Rex 2X Inverse Bitcoin Daily Target ETF (BTCZ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in long btc, short usd currency. The fund aims to provide (-2x) inverse exposure to the daily price movement of spot Bitcoin, less fees, and expenses. The fund uses over-the-counter swaps to pursue its objective. BTCZ was launched on Jul 10, 2024 and is issued by Tuttle Capital Management.

data.title: Firms launch options on swap-based Bitcoin ETF
data.text: Options on just-launched leveraged products that track the spot price of bitcoin via derivative swaps began trading on Thursday, a first for the cryptocurrency exchange-traded fund (ETF) universe.
